div.class: rounded-circle bg-primary text-white d-inline-flex align-items-center justify-content-center mb-3

span.t-att-class: 'bg-danger text-white' if _lvl >= 20 else ('bg-warning text-dark' if _lvl >= 10 else ('bg-info text-white' if _lvl >= 5 else 'bg-primary text-white'))

t.p: This user has not set up their profile yet.
